queries.question: What compensation is offered to software developers?
queries.sql:
select s.Salary_Range 
from position as p 
join salarydetails as s 
on p.id=s.positionid 
where p.title = 'Software Developer'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?salary_range WHERE {
  ?p a :Position .
  ?s a :SalaryDetails .
  ?s p:hasPosition ?p .
  ?s p:Salary_Range ?salary_range .
  ?p p:Title ?title_f .
  FILTER(STR(?title_f) = "Software Developer")
}

queries.sql:
select s.Salary_Range, Hourly_Rate

where p.title = 'Software Developer'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

  ?p a :Position .

  ?s p:hasPosition ?p .
  ?s p:Salary_Range ?salary_range .
  ?s p:Hourly_Rate ?hourly_rate .

queries.question: List all the job positions and the associated salary range.
queries.sql:
select p.title, s.Salary_Range 
from position as p 
join salarydetails as s 
on p.id=s.positionid
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?salary_range WHERE {
  ?p a :Position .
  ?s a :SalaryDetails .
  ?s p:hasPosition ?p .
  ?p p:Title ?title .
  ?s p:Salary_Range ?salary_range .
}

queries.question: Show all the job positions and, for each, list the hourly rate and salary range.
queries.sql:
select p.title, s.Salary_Range, Hourly_Rate 
from position as p 
join salarydetails as s 
on p.id=s.positionid
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?salary_range ?hourly_rate WHERE {
  ?p a :Position .
  ?s a :SalaryDetails .
  ?s p:hasPosition ?p .
  ?p p:Title ?title .
  ?s p:Salary_Range ?salary_range .
  ?s p:Hourly_Rate ?hourly_rate .
}

queries.question: Show me all the positions and their hourly rates.
queries.sql:
select p.title, s.Hourly_Rate 
from position as p 
join salarydetails as s 
on p.id=s.positionid
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?hourly_rate WHERE {
  ?p a :Position .
  ?s a :SalaryDetails .
  ?s p:hasPosition ?p .
  ?p p:Title ?title .
  ?s p:Hourly_Rate ?hourly_rate .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: What compensation is offered to software developers?
Show me all the positions and compensation offered.
